---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue with WAF Payload Arsenal
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. Use payload '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- **Python Version**: [e.g., 3.11.5]
- **WAF Payload Arsenal Version**: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **Installation Method**: [e.g., git clone, Docker]

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🔍 Payload Information (if applicable)

- **Payload Category**: [e.g., XSS, SQLi, CVE]
- **Payload File**: [e.g., payloads/xss/basic.json]
- **Payload ID**: [e.g., xss-0001]

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have provided all requested information
- [ ] I have tested with the latest version
- [ ] This is not a security vulnerability (use SECURITY.md for those)
